'''Sat'Skar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Coyn system/Legends|Coyn system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was considered a sister planet to [[Coyn]] itself. The name "Sat'Skar" meant "[[Sword/Legends|Sword]]" in the [[Coynite language]].

Sat'Skar was extremely hot due to increased levels of greenhouse gases. The planet's only life forms were primitive [[Fungus/Legends|fungi]], bacteria, and microbes.

{{Planet-stub}}
